_comment: Cross-platform lock for the Gemini S2S (Gemini Translate) client-side VAD / segmentation / timeout constants, hand-duplicated between Windows (src/api/realtime_audio/s2s.rs) and Android (GeminiS2sVad.kt). Windows is canonical. Both platforms assert their constant values equal these, so the duplicated tuning cannot silently drift. Integers compared exactly; floats within 1e-6. See .claude/parity/gemini-s2s-vad.md.
